name: review-loop
description: Adversarial review loop that iterates your proposal and diff to a clean pass — parallel Codex + Code Reviewer + Reality Checker review, merge/triage, minimal-change fixes, re-review until APPROVE/CLEAR or a configurable round cap. Optionally augments domain/method specialists per change (findings-only, no extra gate slot, never unlocks a clean APPROVE or offsets Codex absence). Two standing counter-pressures keep the loop's own output honest: a simplicity lens (the loop is insert-only, so it flags the bloat its fixes accrue) and a legibility lens (a fresh-context cold reader that never saw the loop, so an iterated review cannot quietly turn a spec or proposal into a patch pile only the loop can read). Works on anything already written — an OpenSpec change, a proposal, a spec, a diff, including pure prose; a decision with nothing written yet is council, not this. Requires the agency-agents catalog at ~/.agency-agents (install per the README); a role it cannot resolve there halts the run rather than standing in a fabricated expert.
